title: Show package version when running on alpine
body:
BEFORE
```
  conmon:
    package: Unknown
    path: /usr/bin/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.29, commit: b388b959974dee50d451f88949b3499c3ca6ca42'
```

AFTER
```
  conmon:
    package: conmon-2.0.29-r0
    path: /usr/bin/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.29, commit: b388b959974dee50d451f88949b3499c3ca6ca42'
```


And so on.

```
  distribution:
    distribution: alpine
    version: 3.14.3
```

```console
$ apk info -W /usr/bin/conmon
/usr/bin/conmon is owned by conmon-2.0.29-r0
```

https://www.alpinelinux.org/

comments.body:
LGTM
But you need the [NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] flag.
There were no tests in this function, possible due exec.Command. But can go without tests, then.
